query: The last image you generated had an AI look — too smooth, plastic skin, dead eyes. Fix it.
expected_behavior: Adds specific photography parameters to counter the AI look (film grain, specific lens, color grading)
Adds a negative prompt listing the specific artifacts to remove (smooth skin, plastic texture, dead eyes)
Does not simply regenerate the same prompt again — makes targeted changes to the camera and post-processing sections
Documents what was changed and why so the fix is repeatable
Escalates after 3 failed regeneration attempts rather than continuing to loop
